display.purpose: Hero headlines only. The cartographer's big map.

title.purpose: Card titles, subsection headers, panel names.

body.purpose: Running text, descriptions, form labels. Capped at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Tags, badges, metadata, and small UI markers.

shadows.name: ambient
shadows.purpose: Barely-there depth for resting inputs and subtle card anchoring.

shadows.name: ember-glow
shadows.purpose: Amber-tinted glow for primary buttons and accent elements.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Deceleration curve for exit and release motions.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Ambient motion, image zoom, scroll-driven effects.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The cartographer's compass - primary CTA using Desert Amber.
components.css: .ds-btn { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Cairo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1; border: 1px solid transparent; cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; user-select: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), transform 100ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-btn-primary { background: #d99a4a; color: #ffffff; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px -2px rgba(217, 154, 74, 0.28); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #c47f2e; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d99a4a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Soft Button
components.description: Gentle secondary action - Amber Subtle background with dark amber text.
components.css: .ds-btn-soft { background: #faecd8; color: #854e18; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-soft:hover { background: #f3d4a8; } .ds-btn-soft:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-soft:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d99a4a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { background: transparent; color: #d99a4a; border: 1px solid #d99a4a; border-radius: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #fdf8f0; } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d99a4a; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: The signature storefront card - tactile, warm, lifts on hover.
components.html:
New

Product Name

EGP 299New
components.css: .ds-product-card { background: #ffffff; border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #f4f4f5; transition: box-shadow 300ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1), border-color 300ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); } .ds-product-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px -2px rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.1), 0 2px 6px -2px rgba(9, 9, 11, 0.06); border-color: #f3d4a8; } .ds-product-card-img { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4/5; background: #f4f4f5; overflow: hidden; } .ds-product-card-img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 700ms cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-card-img img { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-product-card-badge { position: absolute; top: 12px; left: 12px; background: #c47f2e; color: #fff; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-product-card-wish { position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); border: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; cursor: pointer; color: #a1a1aa; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-product-card-wish:hover { color: #a56520; } .ds-product-card-body { padding: 16px; padding-top: 12px; } .ds-product-card-title { font-family: 'Cairo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #27272a; margin: 0 0 8px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-card-title { color: #854e18; } .ds-product-card-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-product-card-price { font-family: 'Cairo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 900; color: #a56520; } .ds-product-card-tag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: #a56520; background: #fdf8f0; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-product-card-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; background: #c47f2e; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Zinc-toned input that warms to amber on focus.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #e4e4e7; color: #09090b; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'Cairo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.2, 0, 0, 1); width: 100%; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #71717a; } .ds-input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #d99a4a; }

components.name: Navigation Item (Active)
components.description: Active sidebar navigation link with amber accent.
components.html: DashboardProducts
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'Cairo', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: #52525b; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #fdf8f0; color: #854e18; } .ds-nav-active { background: #fdf8f0; color: #854e18; font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview:
Threadly maps the territory between discovery and commerce. The Ember Cartographer charts warm, sun-dried paths through a landscape of possibility - every screen is a new coordinate on an adventure, every interaction a step further into a vibrant bazaar. The design system carries the warmth of late-afternoon sunlight on sandstone alongside the cool confidence of urban zinc; color is not decoration but cartography, marking the paths that matter.

This system rejects generic e-commerce sterility. No flat, gray, faceless marketplace pages. No cookie-cutter card grids without personality. No monochromatic suppression of the brand's natural energy. Threadly is tactile and warm - buttons feel like pressing smooth pottery, cards lift gently off the surface, and every hover state rewards the hand that reached out.
keyCharacteristics: Sun-dried warmth balanced by urban zinc coolness
Tactile, pottery-like interaction feedback on every control
Adventurous color use that guides without overwhelming
Cairo typeface at variable weight - from featherlight display to bold section anchors
Gentle elevation that lifts on interaction, never shouts at rest
Inclusive contrast and readable text as a baseline, not an afterthought

rules.name: The Ember Rule
rules.body: Desert Amber appears on <=15% of any given screen. Its warmth is the point - overuse flattens it into background noise. Reserve it for navigation anchors, primary actions, and focus moments. Terracotta supports; it never leads.

rules.name: The Cool Foundation Rule
rules.body: Background tints stay on the Zinc scale. No amber or terracotta bleeding into surfaces except through deliberate, named accent zones (Amber Subtle, soft badges, category pills). The terrain is cool; only the markers are warm.

rules.name: The Weight-as-Intent Rule
rules.body: Light weights signal display and exploration (hero, big moments). Bold weights signal decision and action (section anchors, buttons, confirmations). Never use weight 300 below 2rem - it becomes unreadable.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards rest at zero shadow or Ambient only. Shadows appear on hover, focus, or elevation change. A resting card with a Mid shadow is a card that's shouting when it should be listening.

rules.name: The Ember Glow Rule
rules.body: The amber-tinted shadow is reserved for primary action elements (buttons, active navigation items, promoted cards). It must not appear on neutral or decorative surfaces.

dos: Do use Desert Amber (#d99a4a) as the primary accent for all CTAs, focus rings, and navigation active states.
Do keep body text at zinc-950 (#09090b) against zinc-50 (#fafafa) backgrounds for >=4.5:1 contrast.
Do let cards rest flat and lift only on hover - the Mid shadow is the hover reward, not the resting state.
Do use Cairo weight 300 only for display-size text (>=3rem); below that, minimum weight is 400.
Do apply rounded-2xl (24px) to cards and rounded-md (8px) to buttons.
Do use the Ember Glow shadow exclusively on primary action elements.
Do warm card borders to amber-200 on hover.
Do cap body text line length at 65-75ch.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards, list items, or callouts.
Don't apply gradient text (background-clip: text) - use a single solid color for emphasis.
Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur + semi-transparent backgrounds) as a default card pattern.
Don't create identical card grids where every card has the same icon + heading + text structure.
Don't place a tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow above every section heading.
Don't tint the page background warm - the Zinc scale is the cool foundation.
Don't use Desert Amber on more than ~15% of any screen's visible area.
Don't rest cards at Mid or High shadow states.
